cards.name: Knight of Cups
cards.interpretation: idealist, charming, artistic, graceful, tactful, diplomatic, mediator, negotiator

cards.name: 9 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: being guarded, living beyond means, material instability, reckless spending, superficiality

cards.name: 7 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of purpose, disarray, confusion, diversion, distractions, clarity, making choices
